meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve Debugging (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Master Git with AI to conquer debugging. A technical checklist for students to integrate Antigravity and Claude Code for professional-grade development.
content.answer_block: Debugging is no longer a solo struggle. By integrating Git version control with AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you can automate error analysis, map dependency failures, and generate precise patches. This workflow transforms mysterious bugs into structured, solvable tasks, ensuring you ship robust code faster than ever before.
content.intro:
You are deep in the trenches of your first major project, staring at a terminal screen flickering with a cryptic stack trace that makes no sense. The hours are bleeding into the night, and every attempted fix seems to break three other features. This is the 'debugging wall'—the rite of passage where most students either quit or level up.

The secret isn't just knowing more syntax; it's leveraging AI to act as a senior engineer looking over your shoulder. By treating Git as your project's memory and Claude Code as your execution engine, you turn debugging from a guessing game into a systematic, repeatable engineering process.

steps.title: Context-Aware Branching
steps.description: Never debug on main. Create a dedicated feature branch to isolate the bug, ensuring you have a clean slate to revert to if the AI-generated fix introduces regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the recent commits and identify the specific module where the current runtime error originated. Create a summary of the state changes leading to the crash.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse your error logs alongside your recent commits to find the exact point of divergence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last 5 commits. Which logic change likely caused the current exception in the authentication flow?
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --read logs/error.log --ask 'Identify the root cause of this stack trace'

steps.title: AI-Driven Regression Testing
steps.description: Before applying a fix, generate a test case that reproduces the bug, ensuring the AI solution is verifiable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a unit test using Jest that reproduces the current bug. Ensure it fails before we apply any fixes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a reproduction unit test for the identified bug'

steps.title: Surgical Patching with Git Diff
steps.description: Apply the fix and use Git to review exactly what the AI changed before committing, maintaining full control over your codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a minimal code change to fix the bug without refactoring unrelated components. Provide the diff.

steps.title: Atomic Commit Verification
steps.description: Validate the fix and commit the changes atomically, linking the commit to the bug report for future project history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the fix in a professional commit message following conventional commits standards.
steps.claude_code_command: git commit -m 'fix: resolve authentication race condition'

pro_tips: Always run 'git diff' after an AI patch; never blindly accept code without understanding the logic.
Use 'git log -p' to let the AI analyze the history of a specific file before asking for a fix.
Tag your AI-generated fixes with a specific prefix like 'ai-fix:' to track how many bugs were solved with LLM assistance.
If the AI suggests a refactor instead of a fix, reject it; keep your pull requests focused to ensure easier code review.
Use Claude Code's '--read' flag to feed only the relevant files to the AI, reducing noise and improving output accuracy.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully squashed your bug, integrate this workflow into your CI/CD pipeline to automate regression testing on every push.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs stall your progress and start building with the precision of a senior engineer. You have the tools, the process, and the community to back you up. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
